mission_title: Bibliotheca V1.2 — Exact Page and Recipe Intelligence

argv:
exec('from pathlib import Path
files = [
    Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\KAYOCKS_STUDY_BIBLIOTHECA_V1\study_server.py"),
    Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\KAYOCKS_STUDY_BIBLIOTHECA_V1\VERIFY_BIBLIOTHECA_V1_2.py"),
]
for path in files:
    compile(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"), str(path), "exec")
print("BIBLIOTHECA_V1_2_SOURCE_COMPILE_OK")')
